title: ochlandra scriptoria var. sivagiriana
intro: Ochlandra scriptoria var. sivagiriana, a type of grass, is a plant species found in tropical regions, particularly in India and Sri Lanka. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which aid in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ochlandra scriptoria var. sivagiriana include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or topical applications, and are traditionally used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, cold, and skin conditions.
